title: coincya monensis subsp. puberula
intro: Coincya monensis subsp. puberula, also known as sea rocket, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is a perennial herb native to the coastal areas of the Iberian Peninsula, characterized by its hairy leaves and stems. The medicinal properties of Coincya monensis subsp. puberula include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which make it useful in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing relief from respiratory issues, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
